programmes.show_description: Drama series. Allie tries to kill Ferguson. Franky makes another escape attempt. Will and Kaz join forces to stop the drug trafficking. Doreen gets a wonderful surprise.
Campers in Cornwall contend with high winds and lashing rain, and CCTV reveals ghostly goings on in a clubhouse that have resulted in the loss of alcohol...
In Somerset, Sara is fired up for country and western week, and a chance to dress up. In Cornwall, will shiny new guest caravans arrive safely after weaving through tiny roads?
In the final head-to-head of the week in Liverpool. which expert will claim victory? Items in the fray include a Polynesian throwing club and an antique fire extinguisher. (Ep50)

programmes.show_name: Inside the Four Seasons: Park Lane
programmes.show_description: We meet some of the hotel's most VIP visitors and discover how staff ensure everyone has the perfect five star stay. And it's all hands on deck for the arrival of the hotel's founder.

Drama series. Channing threatens to close down the garden project. Jake takes steps to stop Will from exposing him. Bridget gets a reprimand for drunkenness.
Branches of an extended family lose each other on the eve of an important party, camp mascots Sparky the Shark and Dino the Dolphin need an upgrade, and there's a gardening competition.
Musical theatre performers Paul and Charlene await news on a new contract and a return next summer. Mark and his pooch rock up for a birthday getaway - but without a cake.

programmes.show_name: The Blitz with Rob Rinder & Ruth Goodman
programmes.show_description: Rob and Ruth head back to wartime London to uncover how the Blitz was experienced by the rich and the poor. As the bombs rained down did your place in society keep you safe?
Relive the first 24 hours of D-Day through the eyes of its last surviving witnesses. This powerful programme blends personal diaries and stories to capture history's most pivotal invasion.
